x-enumeration-literals.name: Clearing House
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The organization that facilitates the exchange, reconciliation, and netting of payment instructions between banks.

Comment:
A common entity (or a common processing mechanism) through which participants agree to exchange transfer instructions for funds, securities or other instruments. (ECB)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization that receives the payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that initiates the payment to settle an obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee clearing processes to ensure stability, security, and compliance.
